description: Wildlife protection, habitat conservation, and biodiversity regulations

questions.title: What wildlife protection and habitat conservation regulations apply in this area, and how are they enforced?
questions.question: What wildlife protection and habitat conservation regulations apply in this area, and how are they enforced?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for clear identification of relevant laws, agencies, permits, penalties, and enforcement mechanisms.

questions.title: Are there designated protected habitats, reserves, or conservation areas, and what activities are restricted there?
questions.question: Are there designated protected habitats, reserves, or conservation areas, and what activities are restricted there?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for specific protected sites, boundaries, restriction types, and management rules.

questions.title: Are any wildlife corridors identified, protected, or required in planning, and how are they maintained?
questions.question: Are any wildlife corridors identified, protected, or required in planning, and how are they maintained?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for named corridors, legal status, connectivity measures, and maintenance responsibilities.

questions.title: Are there specific protections for amphibians, such as breeding-site safeguards, seasonal restrictions, or migration measures?
questions.question: Are there specific protections for amphibians, such as breeding-site safeguards, seasonal restrictions, or migration measures?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for explicit amphibian protections tied to habitat, timing, and compliance requirements.

questions.title: Are there specific protections for birds, including nesting, roosting, migration, or disturbance limits?
questions.question: Are there specific protections for birds, including nesting, roosting, migration, or disturbance limits?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for detailed bird protections, especially nesting season rules and disturbance controls.

questions.title: Are there specific protections for turtles, such as nesting beach protections, road-crossing measures, or harvest bans?
questions.question: Are there specific protections for turtles, such as nesting beach protections, road-crossing measures, or harvest bans?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for concrete turtle protections, habitat safeguards, and seasonal or spatial restrictions.

questions.title: What biodiversity conservation requirements exist for development, land use, or resource projects in this area?
questions.question: What biodiversity conservation requirements exist for development, land use, or resource projects in this area?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for requirements like impact assessments, mitigation hierarchy, offsets, monitoring, and restoration.

questions.title: How are habitat loss, fragmentation, and degradation assessed and minimized before project approval?
questions.question: How are habitat loss, fragmentation, and degradation assessed and minimized before project approval?
questions.scoreInstructions: Score higher for clear assessment methods, avoidance-first measures, mitigation, and measurable thresholds.
